innateAbility.name: Admiral's Rum
innateAbility.description: Douses himself with the Admiral's signature rum upon taking additional player-based damage instances when reaching a certain health threshold.The Rum buff grants bonus movement speed and damage reduction for a period of time.

abilities.name: Torrent
abilities.description: Summons a rising torrent that, after a short delay, stuns and hurls enemy units into the sky.

abilities.name: Tidebringer
abilities.description: Grants increased damage and cleaves a large area of effect in front of Kunkka for a single strike.

abilities.name: X Marks the Spot
abilities.description: Marks the unit-targeted hero's current position with an X, and returns it to the X after several seconds.

abilities.name: Return
abilities.description: Kunkka can return the marked hero to the X at anytime during the duration.

abilities.name: Tidal Wave
abilities.description: Calls upon a tidal wave from behind Kunkka that deals damage, disarms, and drags enemy units along it.

abilities.name: Ghostship
abilities.description: Summons a ghostly ship that sails through the battle before smashing apart, damaging and stunning all enemies caught near the wreckage.
